channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Stone Age’ to ‘Golden Age’: How the final hours before the truce unfolded
item.description: Frantic diplomacy collides with 'genocidal' threats in lead-up to announcement of two-week ceasefire between US, Iran.

item.title: Defeat from the jaws of victory: Israel reacts to Trump’s Iran ceasefire
item.description: Israel's confrontation with its regional nemesis leaves Iran both standing and strategically stronger, analysts say.

item.title: World Athletics postpones Doha Diamond League amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The multi-discipline event scheduled for May 8 will now be held on June 19 should conditions allow, organisers say.

item.title: UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain report attacks despite Iran-US ceasefire
item.description: Several strikes reported across the Gulf region hours after the US and Iran announce a ceasefire for two weeks.

item.title: Lebanon excluded from ceasefire as Israeli strikes continue
item.description: Israel has backed a ceasefire between the US and Iran but made clear it does not extend to Lebanon.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire deal: What are the terms, and what’s next?
item.description: Trump cites Iran's 10-point plan as a basis for negotiation, signalling potential progress towards long-term peace.

item.title: GCC, other Middle East nations react to Iran-US ceasefire announcement
item.description: Countries in the region welcome the temporary truce and urge negotiations for the war's permanent end.

item.title: Tehran celebrates as Iran, US agree to two-week ceasefire
item.description: Iran hails the pause in hostilities as a 'victory', crediting national unity and patience for the agreement.

item.title: US-Israeli war on Iran: What is happening on day 40?
item.description: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel’s biggest Lebanon attack, despite US-Tehran ceasefire
item.description: Israel carries out 100 strikes across Lebanon in 10 minutes, health minister says hospitals overwhelmed with victims.
